- **Tipo:** PDF

USP/Direct Response
Instructions
STEP #1: Spend some time with your client mapping out all the different personas that make up
their audience. Ideally you’ll want 2-3 of these
STEP #2: Start mapping out the specific needs and wants & pain points from each persona. If
you’re stuck here, head to Amazon to check out the copy of books for inspiration
STEP #3: I recommend you send the draft pillars to your client to complete and review and to add
in their own specific results that they helped clients attain - they should know their audience right!
STEP #4: Stitch long form copy together for you ad by simply combining sentences from the
Awesome, the bad and Even If. You can also swipe from the Awesome for your ad headlines
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

PROBLEM/AGITATE

●
